TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Portugal, title = Portugal, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Portugal} }

S.FORM: Portugal hya' ga cyux maki' tay 39 30 N, 8 00 W na Oco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 92,090 sq km (maki' tay 111ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 91,470 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 620 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 10,833,816. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 39.70% , lhlahuy hya' ga 37.80%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 22.50%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Lisbon. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 10 na tay mtzyu' byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Marcelo Rebelo de Sousa, aring ryax 9 squ byacing tay 3 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®

Portugal hya' ga cyux maki' tay 39 30 N, 8 00 W na Oco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 92,090 sq km (maki' tay 111ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 91,470 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 620 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 10,833,816. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 39.70% , lhlahuy hya' ga 37.80%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 22.50%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Lisbon. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 10 na tay mtzyu' byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Marcelo Rebelo de Sousa, aring ryax 9 squ byacing tay 3 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: portu…£al ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®jux maki Ē taj ** ** n, * ** w na o ¶~ ®o s~…ējuw. kwara Ē kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija Ē **,*** s~…ēq km (maki Ē taj ***…£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i Ē) (kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē nija Ē …£a **,*** s~…ēq km , kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē na laws~…ēajan ws~…ēiluŇč ńßja Ē …£a *** s~…ēq km) kinkńßmajan kwara Ē s~…ēquliq ńßja Ē …£a **,***,***. pinő≤ ¶~ ®jan nańßa Ē s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē rńßzjal ńßja Ē ij pqmańßun ńßja Ē …£a **.**% , lńßlańßuj ńßja Ē …£a **.**%, s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē s~…ēa pptzjuwaw s~…ēa ő≤zinańß ńßja Ē …£a **.**%. s~…ēpzjaŇč qalaŇč na kokka Ē s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē krańßu Ē qalaŇč ńßja Ē …£a lis~…ēő≤on. s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē ńßja Ē …£a ** na taj mtzju Ē ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč na qutux kawas~…ē. mrńßuw kokka Ē mrńßuw kokka Ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a mar ¶~ ®elo reő≤elo *e s~…ēous~…ēa, ariŇč rjax * s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®ia ***
